fields.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
fields.label: Anthropic API Key
fields.description: Used when the reviewer runs on Claude (the default, best for long-context paper review). Set this OR OPENAI_API_KEY depending on your model.

fields.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
fields.label: OpenAI-compatible API Key
fields.description: Used for OpenAI / OpenRouter / DeepSeek / Qwen and other OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Pair with a base URL if using a proxy.

fields.name: TAVILY_API_KEY
fields.label: Tavily API Key (web_search)
fields.description: Powers web_search for citation verification. A built-in dev-tier fallback key exists, but a dedicated key avoids rate limits. Get one at https://tavily.com.

fields.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
fields.label: OpenRouter API Key (vision tools)
fields.description: Required only for vision_inspect / video_understand (Gemini via OpenRouter) — used to read figures/tables off PDF page renders.

fields.name: GEMINI_MODEL
fields.label: Vision model slug
fields.description: Overrides the model used for vision_inspect / video_understand.

fields.name: REVIEW_VENUE
fields.label: Target venue
fields.description: Optional: target venue (e.g. 'OSDI 2027'). Passed as extra context to tune strictness.

fields.name: AUDIT_ALL_CITATIONS
fields.label: Audit every citation in the bibliography
fields.description: If on, the reviewer verifies the entire reference list, not just load-bearing ones (hallucinations hide in routine citations).

fields.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
fields.label: Report format
fields.description: Final report format. Markdown is human-readable; JSON is machine-readable for CI gating.
